cases.input: Our Next.js docs site moved /docs/* to /guides/* with no redirects, pages are CSR, and Search Console shows 'Discovered - currently not indexed'. Diagnose and give the technical SEO fixes deeply.
Two blog posts both target 'crawl budget' and neither ranks; write the meta titles, descriptions, and Article JSON-LD and resolve the cannibalization. Keyword set is supplied.
Run an indexability audit on this repo: which directories are missing README.md, which are orphaned from the parent index, and what is the score for G3 readiness?
Checkout converts 38% and cart-to-checkout is the worst transition at 62% drop; the form has 11 fields and no return policy near the pay button. Give me a prioritized, testable CRO plan.
Design the pre-launch funnel for a B2B SaaS whose conversion event is a booked demo: map TOFU/MOFU/BOFU content, lead scoring, nurture flow, and the sales handoff. We have a structured funnel JSON.
Build a new high-conversion landing page for our API monitoring product: hero, features, testimonials, pricing, CTA, footer, SEO-optimized and ready to deploy.
Here is our current pricing landing page URL - critique it against landing-page best practices and tell me what is weakening conversion, without rebuilding it.
Exit surveys say buyers don't trust us enough to enter a card. Which trust signals should I place near the checkout CTA and why?
Make our new feature landing page both rank in Google and convert better.
Find me the highest-volume low-difficulty keywords to target for our SEO this quarter.
Both apex and www of our marketing site resolve with 200 and we have duplicate-content warnings; fix the canonical host and sitemap.
